depth_object_recognition.caption: The video starts with a large, rounded object on the right, positioned at a medium distance. On the far left, several thin, vertical structures, likely trees or poles, are visible at varying distances, showing a clear near-to-far progression. As I move forward, these vertical objects pass to the side. The ground is a flat surface extending into the distance. In later frames, more complex 3D structures appear on the right, suggesting a roadside with vegetation or buildings.

The vertical poles on the left are arranged in a line, with the leftmost pole being the closest and subsequent poles receding into the distance. There is significant overlap between the trees as the camera moves. The ground plane is consistently below all other objects. As I advance, the objects on the left move from the foreground into the midground and then disappear as they are passed.
